sub_task: Verify error handling in launcher scripts
failure_reason: wkr-033-003 (gpt-5.2) and wkr-033-004 (claude-sonnet-4.6) hit 429 rate limits

strengths: Uses set -euo pipefail as baseline protection
Preflight system validates Copilot CLI auth in tmux runtime before launch
Atomic JSON writes via Python tmp+rename pattern (write_json_atomic)
Prerequisite check for required binaries (tmux, python3, jq, git, bash)
Duplicate tmux session detection and cleanup before launch
Agent CLI exit code captured via PIPESTATUS[0]
Blocked state persistence with mark_run_blocked() function

critical_gaps.title: No main cleanup traps (EXIT/ERR/INT)
critical_gaps.description: Failed or interrupted launches leave tmux sessions, scripts, and state behind with no automatic cleanup

critical_gaps.title: Monitor exits 0 on partial/failure conditions
critical_gaps.description: stampede-monitor.sh reports partial failures but always returns exit code 0, masking failures from callers

critical_gaps.title: No proactive gh/git auth validation
critical_gaps.description: No gh auth status check or GITHUB_TOKEN validation before operations begin

critical_gaps.title: Launcher does not fail on partial worker launch failure
critical_gaps.description: If some workers fail to start, launcher prints warning but exits 0

critical_gaps.title: No differentiated exit code taxonomy
critical_gaps.description: All errors use exit 1; no distinction between usage errors, auth failures, runtime failures

critical_gaps.title: Preflight unclear response not treated as failure
critical_gaps.description: Ambiguous agent responses during preflight allow launch to continue despite potential issues

critical_gaps.title: tmux UI commands silently ignore errors
critical_gaps.description: Multiple || true patterns on tmux set-option/select-pane could mask session-state issues

critical_gaps.title: No disk space or write permission pre-checks
critical_gaps.description: mkdir -p relies on set -e but no proactive space/permission validation

tmux_analysis.note: Worker wkr-033-003 hit rate limit; analysis performed by squad lead from grep data

file_ops_analysis.note: Worker wkr-033-004 hit rate limit; analysis performed by squad lead from grep data
file_ops_analysis.corrupt_json_handling: partial - .tmp- prefix filter in queue reads

recommendations: Add trap 'cleanup' EXIT ERR INT to stampede.sh main body
Make monitor/merge return non-zero on partial/failed conditions
Add gh auth status check to check_prereqs()
Add --strict flag that makes partial worker launch fatal
Pre-check write permissions on .stampede directory before queue creation
